style_effects: Gentle sparkling dust trails shimmer with iridescent hues of rose and lavender, drifting lazily upward like fireflies. A soft, pearlescent aura envelops the body in delicate petal-shaped particles that refract light into pastel rainbows, while faint musical note vibrations pulse gently in the air. The lighting mood is warm and dreamy, bathed in a gentle golden-hour glow that enhances the ethereal, fairy-like presence. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
